member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SolidWorks.Data.SwDm3rdPartyStorage
member.summary: Wraps a third-party structured storage inside a SOLIDWORKS document managed by Document Manager. 包装 SOLIDWORKS 文档中的第三方结构化存储（Storage），用于读写自定义二进制数据容器。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SolidWorks.Data.SwDm3rdPartyStorage.#ctor(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMDocument19,System.String,Xarial.XCad.Data.Enums.AccessType_e)
member.summary: Opens the named third-party storage and loads it into the generic COM storage adapter. 打开指定名称的第三方存储，并将其加载到通用 COM Storage 适配器中。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SolidWorks.Data.SwDm3rdPartyStorage.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the third-party storage handle back to Document Manager. 将第三方存储句柄释放回 Document Manager，避免文档保持占用状态。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SolidWorks.Data.SwDm3rdPartyStream
member.summary: Wraps a third-party stream inside a SOLIDWORKS document. 包装 SOLIDWORKS 文档中的第三方数据流（Stream），常用于顺序读写插件自定义数据。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SolidWorks.Data.SwDm3rdPartyStream.#ctor(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMDocument19,System.String,Xarial.XCad.Data.Enums.AccessType_e)
member.summary: Opens the named third-party stream and positions the cursor at the beginning. 打开指定名称的第三方数据流，并把读写游标定位到流起始位置。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SolidWorks.Data.SwDm3rdPartyStream.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases the stream back to Document Manager after the wrapper is disposed. 在包装器释放后，把底层流句柄归还给 Document Manager。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmConfigurationCustomPropertiesCollection
member.summary: Repository of configuration-specific custom properties. 配置特定（Configuration-specific）的自定义属性仓库。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmConfigurationCustomPropertiesCollection.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Enumerates configuration properties except the internal quantity placeholder property. 枚举指定配置的自定义属性，并排除内部数量占位属性。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmConfigurationCustomProperty
member.summary: Custom property implementation backed by a specific configuration. 由某个具体配置驱动的自定义属性实现。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmConfigurationCustomProperty.AddValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a new property to the active configuration record. 向当前配置记录添加新的自定义属性。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmConfigurationCustomProperty.ReadRawValue(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.SwDmCustomInfoType@,System.String@)
member.summary: Reads the raw property payload from the configuration property table. 从配置属性表读取原始属性数据。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmConfigurationCustomProperty.SetValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Updates an existing configuration-specific property. 更新配置特定的现有自定义属性。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmConfigurationCustomProperty.Delete
member.summary: Deletes the configuration-specific property from the document model. 从文档模型中删除该配置特定属性。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.ISwDmCustomPropertiesCollection
member.summary: Shared custom property repository contract for Document Manager objects. Document Manager 对象通用的自定义属性仓库约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCustomPropertiesCollection
member.summary: Base repository implementation for document, configuration, and cut-list custom properties. 文档、配置和切割清单自定义属性仓库的基础实现。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCustomPropertiesCollection.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Indexes properties by name using xCAD repository helpers. 使用 xCAD 仓库辅助方法按属性名索引自定义属性。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCustomPropertiesCollection.PreCreate``1
member.summary: Pre-creates a transient property wrapper that can be configured before commit. 预创建一个临时属性包装器，便于在提交前先配置名称和值。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCustomPropertiesCollection.RemoveRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Xarial.XCad.Data.IXProperty},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes property wrappers by forwarding deletion to the concrete property implementation. 通过具体属性实现执行删除操作，从仓库中移除指定属性。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCustomPropertiesCollection.TryGet(System.String,Xarial.XCad.Data.IXProperty@)
member.summary: Attempts to create a live property wrapper only when the property already exists in the source object. 仅当源对象中已存在该属性时，才创建对应的实时属性包装器。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.ISwDmCustomProperty
member.summary: Represents a custom property exposed through Document Manager. 表示通过 Document Manager 访问的自定义属性。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCustomProperty
member.summary: Base implementation that normalizes property read, write, and type conversion logic. 统一处理属性读写、提交状态与类型转换逻辑的基础实现。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCustomProperty.Value
member.summary: Stores either the resolved value or the raw expression depending on the Document Manager state. 根据 Document Manager 当前状态返回解析后的属性值，或在未提交时返回暂存值。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCustomProperty.Expression
member.summary: Accesses the expression text behind the property value, such as equation-driven references. 访问属性值背后的表达式文本，例如由方程或链接驱动的属性表达式。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCustomProperty.Commit(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Commits a pre-created property into the underlying document/configuration storage. 将预创建的属性真正写入底层文档或配置的属性存储中。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCustomProperty.GetPropertyType(System.Object)
member.summary: Infers the SOLIDWORKS custom property type from a .NET runtime value. 根据 .NET 运行时值推断 SOLIDWORKS 自定义属性的数据类型。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCustomProperty.ReadValue(System.String@)
member.summary: Converts the raw string-based Document Manager value into a .NET object while preserving the expression. 将 Document Manager 返回的字符串值转换为 .NET 对象，并同时保留原始表达式文本。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCutListCustomPropertiesCollection
member.summary: Repository of cut-list custom properties for weldment or sheet-metal bodies. 焊件或钣金实体对应的切割清单自定义属性仓库。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCutListCustomPropertiesCollection.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Enumerates cut-list properties while skipping internal helper entries. 枚举切割清单属性，同时跳过内部辅助属性项。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCutListCustomProperty
member.summary: Custom property bound to a cut-list item and optionally scoped by configuration. 绑定到切割清单项目的自定义属性实现，并可按配置范围进行约束。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCutListCustomProperty.AddValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a cut-list property only when the target configuration is writable through Document Manager. 仅当目标配置可由 Document Manager 写入时，才允许新增切割清单属性。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCutListCustomProperty.ReadRawValue(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.SwDmCustomInfoType@,System.String@)
member.summary: Reads the cut-list property raw value and the expression it is linked to. 读取切割清单属性的原始值，以及它所链接到的表达式文本。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCutListCustomProperty.SetValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Updates the cut-list property when the active configuration rules allow writing. 当活动配置规则允许写入时，更新切割清单属性。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmCutListCustomProperty.Delete
member.summary: Deletes the cut-list property while respecting configuration limitations of Document Manager. 在遵守 Document Manager 配置限制的前提下删除切割清单属性。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmDocumentCustomPropertiesCollection
member.summary: Repository of file-level custom properties stored directly on the document. 直接存储在文档级别上的自定义属性仓库。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmDocumentCustomPropertiesCollection.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Enumerates document properties except the internal quantity helper property. 枚举文档自定义属性，并排除内部使用的数量辅助属性。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmDocumentCustomProperty
member.summary: Concrete custom property bound to the document-level property table. 绑定到文档级属性表的具体自定义属性实现。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmDocumentCustomProperty.AddValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a new document custom property and marks the file as modified. 向文档添加新的自定义属性，并把文件标记为已修改。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmDocumentCustomProperty.ReadRawValue(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.SwDmCustomInfoType@,System.String@)
member.summary: Reads the raw property value and linked expression from the document property manager. 从文档属性管理器读取原始属性值及其链接表达式。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmDocumentCustomProperty.SetValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Updates the stored string representation of the document custom property. 更新文档自定义属性保存的字符串值。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Data.SwDmDocumentCustomProperty.Delete
member.summary: Deletes the document custom property and marks the document dirty. 删除文档级自定义属性，并把文档标记为脏状态。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmAssembly
member.summary: Assembly document contract for the Document Manager backend. 面向 Document Manager 后端的装配体文档约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmAssembly
member.summary: Assembly document wrapper that exposes configuration-level assembly data through xCAD. 装配体文档包装器，通过 xCAD 暴露装配体的配置、组件树等离线数据。
Initializes the assembly document and defers configuration repository creation until needed. 初始化装配体文档，并延迟创建配置仓库以减少不必要的 COM 访问。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmVirtualAssembly
member.summary: Represents a virtual assembly embedded inside another assembly document. 表示嵌入在父装配体中的虚拟装配体文档。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmVirtualAssembly.OnOwnerDisposed(Xarial.XCad.Documents.IXDocument)
member.summary: Closes the virtual document when the owning parent document is destroyed. 当所属父文档被销毁时，联动关闭该虚拟文档。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponent.#ctor(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmAssembly,SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMComponent)
member.summary: Builds a component wrapper and prepares lazy path and child-resolution logic. 构建组件包装器，并准备延迟路径解析与子组件解析逻辑。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponent.GetFirstNonVirtualParentDirectry
member.summary: Finds the first parent directory that belongs to a non-virtual component chain. 找到第一个属于非虚拟组件链的父级目录，用于解析真实文件路径。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponent.State
member.summary: Calculates the component state flags from suppression, visibility, BOM, and envelope data. 根据压缩、显示、BOM 和信封体状态计算组件状态位标志。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponent.Transformation
member.summary: Returns the transform matrix of the component in assembly space. 返回组件在装配体坐标空间中的变换矩阵。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponent.GetSpecificReferencedDocument``1
member.summary: Resolves and opens the referenced part or assembly document, including support for virtual components. 解析并打开组件引用的零件或装配体文档，同时兼容虚拟组件。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmPartComponent
member.summary: Wrapper for a part component inside an assembly. 装配体中的零件组件包装器。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmAssemblyComponent
member.summary: Wrapper for a subassembly component inside an assembly. 装配体中的子装配体组件包装器。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponentConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration proxy used when a component references a named configuration of another document. 当组件引用另一个文档的具名配置时使用的配置代理。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmPartComponentConfiguration
member.summary: Part configuration proxy exposed through a component reference. 通过组件引用暴露出来的零件配置代理。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmAssemblyComponentConfiguration
member.summary: Assembly configuration proxy exposed through a component reference. 通过组件引用暴露出来的装配体配置代理。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSubComponentCollection
member.summary: Child component repository that also links each component back to its parent node. 子组件仓库实现，同时把每个生成的组件节点回链到其父组件。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.EmptyComponentCollection
member.summary: Empty repository used when a component cannot have children. 当组件不可能包含子节点时使用的空仓库实现。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmComponentCollection
member.summary: Repository of assembly components exposed by Document Manager. 由 Document Manager 暴露的装配体组件仓库。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponentCollection
member.summary: Enumerates and caches components for an assembly configuration. 按装配体配置枚举并缓存组件，用于构建离线组件树。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponentCollection.#ctor(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmAssembly,Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmConfiguration)
member.summary: Creates a component repository for a specific assembly configuration. 为指定装配体配置创建组件仓库。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponentCollection.Count
member.summary: Counts immediate child components of the current configuration. 统计当前配置下的一级子组件数量。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponentCollection.TotalCount
member.summary: Counts all descendant components recursively, including nested subassemblies. 递归统计全部后代组件数量，包括子装配体中的嵌套组件。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponentCollection.GetComponents(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMConfiguration)
member.summary: Reads the raw Document Manager component array for a configuration. 读取指定配置对应的原始 Document Manager 组件数组。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponentCollection.ValidateSpeedPak(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMConfiguration)
member.summary: Rejects SpeedPak configurations because Document Manager cannot expose a complete component tree for them. 拒绝处理 SpeedPak 配置，因为 Document Manager 无法为其提供完整的组件树。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponentCollection.CountComponents(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMConfiguration,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Int32},System.Int32@)
member.summary: Recursively traverses subassemblies to accumulate a full component count. 递归遍历子装配体，累计完整组件数量。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmComponentCollection.CreateComponentInstance(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMComponent)
member.summary: Creates or reuses a cached strongly typed component wrapper. 创建或复用已缓存的强类型组件包装器。

member.name: F:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfiguration.QTY_PROPERTY
member.summary: Internal quantity property used by SOLIDWORKS BOM and cut-list logic. SOLIDWORKS BOM 与切割清单逻辑内部使用的数量属性名。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfiguration.#ctor(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMConfiguration,Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument3D)
member.summary: Creates a configuration wrapper and its configuration-level property repository. 创建配置包装器及其配置级自定义属性仓库。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfiguration.Preview
member.summary: Extracts the preview bitmap stored for this configuration. 提取该配置保存的 PNG 预览图。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfiguration.Quantity
member.summary: Resolves BOM quantity by following the `UNIT_OF_MEASURE` property chain. 按照 `UNIT_OF_MEASURE` 属性链解析 BOM 数量值。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfiguration.BomChildrenSolving
member.summary: Determines how child components should be solved into the BOM for assembly configurations. 决定装配体配置中的子组件应如何展开到 BOM 中。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfiguration.Parent
member.summary: Returns the parent derived configuration when one exists. 如果存在派生关系，则返回父配置。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfiguration.GetParentConfiguration
member.summary: Retrieves the parent configuration from the configuration manager. 从配置管理器中取得父配置对象。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfiguration.TryGetDocumentPropertyValue(System.String)
member.summary: Tries to read a document-level custom property without failing the configuration query flow. 尝试读取文档级属性，避免配置数量解析流程因单个读取失败而中断。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfiguration.TryGetConfigurationPropertyValue(System.String)
member.summary: Tries to read a configuration-level property and wraps invalid configuration errors with context. 尝试读取配置级属性，并为无效配置错误补充上下文信息。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfiguration.GetPartNumber(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmConfiguration)
member.summary: Resolves the BOM part number according to the SOLIDWORKS BOM source setting. 按照 SOLIDWORKS BOM 零件号来源设置解析最终的物料号。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmAssemblyConfiguration
member.summary: Assembly configuration contract. 装配体配置约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmAssemblyConfiguration
member.summary: Concrete assembly configuration wrapper. 装配体配置的具体包装实现。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmPartConfiguration
member.summary: Part configuration contract. 零件配置约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmPartConfiguration
member.summary: Concrete part configuration wrapper that also exposes cut-list repositories. 具体的零件配置包装实现，同时暴露切割清单仓库。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmConfigurationCollection
member.summary: Repository contract for document configurations. 文档配置仓库约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfigurationCollection
member.summary: Shared configuration repository logic for parts and assemblies. 零件与装配体共用的配置仓库逻辑。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfigurationCollection.Active
member.summary: Returns the active configuration resolved by the underlying configuration manager. 返回由底层配置管理器解析出的活动配置。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfigurationCollection.Count
member.summary: Counts available configurations, using the newer API when version-aware errors are exposed. 统计可用配置数量；若版本支持，则使用可返回详细错误码的新 API。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfigurationCollection.#ctor(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument3D)
member.summary: Initializes the repository and its configuration cache. 初始化配置仓库以及内部配置缓存。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfigurationCollection.GetConfigurationNames
member.summary: Retrieves all configuration names from the model. 从模型中提取全部配置名称。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfigurationCollection.TryGet(System.String,Xarial.XCad.Documents.IXConfiguration@)
member.summary: Resolves a configuration by name and caches the wrapper instance. 按名称解析配置并缓存包装器实例。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmConfigurationCollection.RemoveRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Xarial.XCad.Documents.IXConfiguration},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Marks configurations for deletion, except the active configuration. 将配置标记为删除，但不允许删除当前活动配置。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmAssemblyConfigurationCollection
member.summary: Specialized repository contract for assembly configurations. 装配体配置仓库的专用约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmPartConfigurationCollection
member.summary: Specialized repository contract for part configurations. 零件配置仓库的专用约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmAssemblyConfigurationCollection
member.summary: Assembly configuration repository implementation. 装配体配置仓库实现。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmPartConfigurationCollection
member.summary: Part configuration repository implementation. 零件配置仓库实现。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmDocument
member.summary: Base document contract for all Document Manager-backed xCAD documents. 所有基于 Document Manager 的 xCAD 文档共用的基础约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument
member.summary: Core document wrapper responsible for open, save, close, and repository integration. 核心文档包装器，负责打开、保存、关闭以及与 xCAD 仓库体系的集成。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument.GetDocumentType(System.String)
member.summary: Determines the SOLIDWORKS native document type from the file extension. 根据文件扩展名判断 SOLIDWORKS 原生文档类型。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument.OpenDocument(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens the underlying document on first commit and raises storage availability notifications. 在首次提交时打开底层文档，并触发流与存储可用通知。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument.OpenDocument(System.String,Xarial.XCad.Documents.Enums.DocumentState_e)
member.summary: Opens a document by path and translates Document Manager open errors into xCAD exceptions. 按路径打开文档，并把 Document Manager 的打开错误转换为 xCAD 异常。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument.Close
member.summary: Closes the native document and detaches it from the repository. 关闭底层文档，并将其从文档仓库中解除注册。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument.Commit(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Commits a pre-created document and publishes it into the document repository. 提交预创建文档，并将其发布到文档仓库中。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument.OpenStorage(System.String,Xarial.XCad.Data.Enums.AccessType_e)
member.summary: Opens a named third-party structured storage inside the document. 打开文档内指定名称的第三方结构化存储。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument.OpenStream(System.String,Xarial.XCad.Data.Enums.AccessType_e)
member.summary: Opens a named third-party stream inside the document. 打开文档内指定名称的第三方数据流。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument.Save
member.summary: Saves the current document back to its existing path. 将当前文档保存回其现有路径。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument.PreCreateSaveAsOperation(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a deferred Save As operation that can be committed later. 创建一个延迟执行的另存为操作，稍后可通过提交执行。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument.PerformSave(Xarial.XCad.Documents.Enums.DocumentSaveType_e,System.String,System.Func{System.String,System.Boolean},System.Func{SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMDocument,System.String,SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.SwDmDocumentSaveError})
member.summary: Central save pipeline that raises events, exposes custom storages, and processes save results. 统一的保存流程：触发事件、开放自定义存储写入，并处理保存结果。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument.ProcessSaveResult(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.SwDmDocumentSaveError)
member.summary: Converts save error codes into exceptions meaningful to xCAD callers. 将保存错误码转换为对 xCAD 调用方更有意义的异常。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument.IsFileExtensionShown
member.summary: Checks the Windows Explorer setting to decide whether titles should include file extensions. 检查 Windows 资源管理器设置，以决定标题是否应包含文件扩展名。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmUnknownDocument
member.summary: Temporary document wrapper that resolves its concrete type after the file path is known. 临时未知文档包装器，会在已知文件路径后再解析为具体文档类型。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmUnknownDocument.GetSpecific
member.summary: Converts the unknown wrapper into a concrete part, assembly, or drawing wrapper. 把未知文档包装器转换为具体的零件、装配体或工程图包装器。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmUnknownDocument3D
member.summary: Placeholder 3D unknown document used when the exact part/assembly type is still unresolved. 当尚未确定是零件还是装配体时使用的三维未知文档占位实现。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentExtension
member.summary: Extension helpers for version-based document capability checks. 基于版本判断文档能力的扩展辅助方法。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmDocument3D
member.summary: Common contract for part and assembly documents handled by Document Manager. Document Manager 中零件与装配体文档共享的三维文档约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument3D
member.summary: Base implementation for 3D model documents. 三维模型文档的基础实现，供零件和装配体共用。
Initializes a 3D document wrapper without deciding whether it is a part or assembly yet. 初始化三维文档包装器，但暂不关心其具体是零件还是装配体。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmVirtualDocumentHelper
member.summary: Helper methods for titles of virtual documents created by SOLIDWORKS. 处理 SOLIDWORKS 虚拟文档标题的辅助工具，主要用于去除内部临时前缀。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmVirtualDocumentHelper.GetTitle(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the temporary prefix that SOLIDWORKS adds to virtual document names. 去掉 SOLIDWORKS 为虚拟文档名称添加的临时前缀。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmDocumentCollection
member.summary: Repository contract for opened or pre-created Document Manager documents. 已打开或预创建的 Document Manager 文档仓库约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentCollection
member.summary: Tracks all document wrappers owned by a Document Manager application instance. 跟踪某个 Document Manager 应用实例所拥有的全部文档包装器。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentCollection.Active
member.summary: Active document in the repository; this is a logical xCAD concept rather than a UI selection. 仓库中的当前活动文档；这里表示的是逻辑活动对象，而不是界面中的前台窗口。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentCollection.#ctor(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplication)
member.summary: Creates a repository bound to the owning Document Manager application wrapper. 创建绑定到所属 Document Manager 应用包装器的文档仓库。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentCollection.TryGet(System.String,Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmDocument@)
member.summary: Resolves an already tracked document by path, file name, or title. 按完整路径、文件名或标题解析已跟踪的文档。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentCollection.PreCreate``1
member.summary: Pre-creates a document wrapper of the requested xCAD type. 按请求的 xCAD 类型预创建文档包装器。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentCollection.OnDocumentCreated(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmDocument)
member.summary: Registers a newly created document and updates the active document pointer. 注册新创建的文档，并更新当前活动文档指针。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentCollection.OnDocumentClosed(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmDocument)
member.summary: Unregisters a closed document and promotes the first remaining document as active. 注销已关闭文档，并将剩余列表中的第一个文档设为活动文档。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmDocumentCollectionExtension
member.summary: Helper extensions for pre-creating a document from a file path. 根据文件路径预创建文档的辅助扩展方法。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmDocumentCollectionExtension.PreCreateFromPath(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmDocumentCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Chooses the proper document wrapper type from the SOLIDWORKS file extension. 根据 SOLIDWORKS 文件扩展名选择合适的文档包装器类型。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentDependencies
member.summary: Enumerates external references of a document through Document Manager. 通过 Document Manager 枚举文档的外部引用关系。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentDependencies.Cached
member.summary: Document Manager always returns resolved references rather than raw cached paths. Document Manager 总是返回解析后的引用关系，而不是原始缓存引用。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentDependencies.#ctor(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument)
member.summary: Creates the dependency enumerator and cache for virtual documents. 创建依赖枚举器，并建立虚拟文档缓存。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentDependencies.Replace(Xarial.XCad.Documents.IXDocument3D,Xarial.XCad.Documents.IXDocument3D)
member.summary: Replaces one external reference path with another. 用新的外部引用路径替换旧路径。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentDependencies.IterateDependencies
member.summary: Resolves dependency wrappers, including virtual documents referenced from assemblies. 解析依赖文档包装器，同时兼容装配体中的虚拟文档引用。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocumentDependencies.GetRawDependencies
member.summary: Reads raw dependency paths and their virtual flags from Document Manager. 从 Document Manager 读取原始依赖路径以及是否为虚拟文档的标记。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmDrawing
member.summary: Drawing document contract. 工程图文档约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawing
member.summary: Drawing document wrapper that exposes sheets through xCAD. 工程图文档包装器，通过 xCAD 暴露图纸页集合。
Initializes the drawing wrapper and delays sheet enumeration until requested. 初始化工程图包装器，并在真正访问时再延迟枚举图纸页。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmDrawingView
member.summary: Drawing view contract exposed by Document Manager. 由 Document Manager 暴露的工程图视图约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawingView
member.summary: Wrapper for a drawing view and its referenced model/configuration. 工程图视图包装器，同时负责解析其引用模型与配置。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawingView.ReferencedDocument
member.summary: Resolves the model document referenced by the drawing view. 解析该工程图视图所引用的模型文档。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawingView.ReferencedConfiguration
member.summary: Resolves the referenced configuration within the referenced model document. 在引用模型文档中解析该视图对应的配置。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawingView.#ctor(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMView,Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawing)
member.summary: Creates the drawing view wrapper and binds it to the owning drawing. 创建工程图视图包装器，并绑定到所属工程图。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmDrawingViewsCollection
member.summary: Repository contract for drawing views on a sheet. 图纸页上的工程图视图仓库约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawingViewsCollection
member.summary: Enumerates drawing views belonging to a specific sheet. 枚举某个图纸页上的全部工程图视图。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawingViewsCollection.#ctor(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSheet,Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawing)
member.summary: Creates a sheet-scoped view repository. 创建限定在单个图纸页范围内的视图仓库。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawingViewsCollection.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Converts raw view COM objects into xCAD drawing view wrappers. 将原始视图 COM 对象转换为 xCAD 工程图视图包装器。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmPart
member.summary: Part document contract. 零件文档约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmPart
member.summary: Part document wrapper for configurations and part-specific data. 零件文档包装器，负责暴露配置以及零件特有的数据入口。
Initializes the part wrapper and delays configuration creation until needed. 初始化零件包装器，并在需要时再延迟创建配置集合。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmVirtualPart
member.summary: Represents a virtual part embedded into another owning document. 表示嵌入在其他父文档中的虚拟零件。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSaveOperation
member.summary: Deferred save-as operation used by xCAD save pipelines. xCAD 保存流程中使用的延迟另存为操作。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSaveOperation.#ctor(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a save operation bound to a target document and file path. 创建绑定到目标文档与目标文件路径的保存操作。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSaveOperation.SaveAs(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the Save As pipeline through the owning document wrapper. 通过所属文档包装器执行另存为流程。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmSheet
member.summary: Drawing sheet contract. 图纸页约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSheet
member.summary: Wrapper for a single drawing sheet, including scale, paper size, and views. 单张图纸页的包装器，包含比例、图幅和视图集合等信息。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSheet.Scale
member.summary: Reads the sheet scale from the low-level sheet property array. 从底层图纸页属性数组中读取图纸比例。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSheet.PaperSize
member.summary: Reads the paper size, including custom width and height for user-defined formats. 读取图纸幅面；若为自定义图幅，则同时返回宽度与高度。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSheet.Preview
member.summary: Extracts the preview image stored for the sheet. 提取该图纸页保存的预览图像。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSheet.#ctor(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMSheet,Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawing)
member.summary: Creates the sheet wrapper and lazily binds the drawing view repository. 创建图纸页包装器，并延迟绑定工程图视图仓库。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmSheetCollection
member.summary: Repository contract for drawing sheets. 工程图图纸页仓库约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSheetCollection
member.summary: Enumerates and resolves sheets contained in a drawing document. 枚举并解析工程图文档中的全部图纸页。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSheetCollection.#ctor(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawing)
member.summary: Creates a sheet repository for the specified drawing. 为指定工程图创建图纸页仓库。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSheetCollection.Active
member.summary: Returns the active sheet recorded in the drawing document. 返回工程图当前记录的活动图纸页。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSheetEnumerator
member.summary: Custom enumerator over drawing sheets. 工程图图纸页的自定义枚举器。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmSheetEnumerator.#ctor(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDrawing)
member.summary: Captures the raw sheet COM objects once at enumerator construction time. 在枚举器构造时一次性抓取原始图纸页 COM 对象。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Exceptions.ConfigurationCutListIsNotSupported
member.summary: Exception indicates that cut-lists cannot be exctrated for this version of the SOLIDWORKS file 表示当前 SOLIDWORKS 文件版本不支持按该方式提取切割清单。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Exceptions.ConfigurationSpecificCutListPropertiesWriteNotSupportedException
member.summary: Raised when code attempts to write cut-list properties for a non-active configuration. 当代码尝试写入非活动配置的切割清单属性时抛出该异常。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Exceptions.InvalidConfigurationsException
member.summary: Raised when configuration metadata cannot be resolved or is internally inconsistent. 当配置元数据无法解析，或配置数据本身不一致时抛出该异常。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Exceptions.InvalidConfigurationsException.GetError(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.SwDMConfigurationError)
member.summary: Converts Document Manager configuration error codes to user-facing messages. 将 Document Manager 的配置错误码转换为面向用户的描述信息。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Exceptions.SpeedPakConfigurationComponentsException
member.summary: Raised when the caller tries to enumerate components from a SpeedPak configuration. 当调用方尝试从 SpeedPak 配置中枚举组件时抛出该异常。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Exceptions.SwDmConnectFailedException
member.summary: Raised when the Document Manager COM application cannot be created or authenticated. 当 Document Manager COM 应用无法创建或许可证认证失败时抛出该异常。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Exceptions.SwDmSdkNotInstalledException
member.summary: Raised when the required SOLIDWORKS Document Manager SDK registration is missing. 当必需的 SOLIDWORKS Document Manager SDK 未安装或未正确注册时抛出该异常。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Features.ISwDmCutListItem
member.summary: Cut-list item contract backed by Document Manager. 由 Document Manager 支持的切割清单项目约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Features.SwDmCutListItem
member.summary: Wraps a weldment or sheet-metal cut-list item. 包装焊件或钣金中的切割清单项目。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Features.SwDmCutListItem.#ctor(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMCutListItem2,Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmPart)
member.summary: Creates a cut-list item wrapper for the document-level cut-list scope. 为文档级切割清单范围创建切割清单项目包装器。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Features.SwDmCutListItem.Bodies
member.summary: Enumerates placeholder solid bodies based on the cut-list quantity. 根据切割清单数量枚举占位实体体，用于表达该清单项对应的实体数量。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Features.SwDmCutListItem.Status
member.summary: Returns the BOM inclusion/exclusion status of the cut-list item. 返回切割清单项目在物料清单中的包含或排除状态。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Features.SwDmCutListItem.Type
member.summary: Returns the cut-list semantic type such as实体体、钣金或焊件。 Returns the cut-list semantic type such as solid body, sheet metal, or weldment.

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Features.SwDmCutListItemCollection
member.summary: Repository of cut-list items for a part configuration. 某个零件配置对应的切割清单项目仓库。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Features.SwDmCutListItemCollection.#ctor(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.ISwDmPartConfiguration,Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmPart)
member.summary: Creates a cut-list repository bound to a part and configuration. 创建绑定到零件及其配置的切割清单仓库。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Features.SwDmCutListItemCollection.IterateCutLists
member.summary: Enumerates cut-list items using the best available API for the current SOLIDWORKS version. 根据当前 SOLIDWORKS 版本选择合适的 API 来枚举切割清单项目。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Geometry.ISwDmBody
member.summary: Base body contract for Document Manager geometry wrappers. Document Manager 几何包装器中的基础实体体约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Geometry.SwDmBody
member.summary: Minimal body implementation used when Document Manager can expose a body concept but not full B-Rep details. 当 Document Manager 只能暴露“实体体”概念、却无法提供完整 B-Rep 拓扑时使用的最小实现。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Geometry.SwDmBody.#ctor(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmPart)
member.summary: Associates the body wrapper with the owning part document. 将实体体包装器关联到所属零件文档。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Geometry.ISwDmSolidBody
member.summary: Solid body contract. 实体体（Solid Body）约定。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Geometry.SwDmSolidBody
member.summary: Solid body placeholder used for cut-list quantity expansion. 用于切割清单数量展开的实体体占位实现。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Geometry.SwDmSolidBody.#ctor(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmPart)
member.summary: Creates a solid body wrapper owned by the specified part. 创建一个由指定零件拥有的实体体包装器。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Services.IFilePathResolver
member.summary: Service which provides custom path resolvers 提供引用文件路径解析能力的服务接口。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Services.IFilePathResolver.ResolvePath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Resolves the path of the document 解析被引用文档的实际路径。
member.param: Parent document full path / 父文档完整路径
Cached document path / 缓存的引用路径
member.returns: Resolved path / 解析后的路径

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Services.SwDmFilePathResolver
member.summary: Resolves the reference path for the document 解析文档引用路径，模拟 SOLIDWORKS 查找被引用文档的搜索规则。
member.remarks: This logic implemented according to 该逻辑按照 SOLIDWORKS 官方“引用文档搜索顺序”实现。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Services.SwDmFilePathResolver.ResolvePath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Resolves a component/document reference first relative to the parent document, then falls back to the cached absolute path. 优先基于父文档目录解析组件或文档引用，失败后再回退到缓存的绝对路径。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Services.SwDmFilePathResolver.TrySearchRecursively(System.String,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Searches for the referenced file by walking up parent folders and replaying the relative subfolder structure. 通过向上回溯父目录并重建相对子目录结构的方式搜索引用文件。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Services.SwDmFilePathResolver.IsReferenceExists(System.String)
member.summary: Indicates whether the candidate reference path actually exists on disk. 判断候选引用路径在磁盘上是否真实存在。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.ISwDmApplication
member.summary: Document Manager application wrapper exposed through xCAD. 通过 xCAD 暴露的 Document Manager 应用程序包装器，用于把底层 COM API 映射为统一的 xCAD 应用入口。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.ISwDmApplication.SwDocMgr
member.summary: Underlying SOLIDWORKS Document Manager COM application. 底层的 SOLIDWORKS Document Manager COM 应用对象。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.ISwDmApplication.LicenseKey
member.summary: License key required to establish the Document Manager session. 建立 Document Manager 会话所需的许可证密钥。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplication
member.summary: Implements lazy connection, lifecycle management, and document ownership for the Document Manager environment. 实现 Document Manager 环境的延迟连接、生命周期管理以及文档仓库的统一持有逻辑。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplication.CreateApplication(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates the native Document Manager application when the pre-created xCAD wrapper is committed. 当预创建的 xCAD 包装器被提交时，再真正创建底层 Document Manager 应用对象。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplication.Close
member.summary: Closes all opened document wrappers before releasing the application COM object. 在释放应用程序 COM 对象之前，先关闭当前包装器管理的全部已打开文档。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplication.Dispose
member.summary: Releases COM resources owned by the application wrapper. 释放应用包装器持有的 COM 资源，避免 Document Manager 句柄泄漏。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplication.Commit(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finalizes the lazy application creation. 完成延迟创建流程，使预创建对象转为可用的 Document Manager 应用实例。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplicationExtension
member.summary: Convenience extensions for version comparison. 便捷的版本比较扩展，便于按 SOLIDWORKS 年代版本做能力分支判断。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplicationFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory to create instance of the 提供用于创建 的工厂，屏蔽注册表、COM 和许可证连接细节。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplicationFactory.PreCreate
member.summary: Pre-creates application 预创建应用程序包装器，此时尚未真正连接到 Document Manager。
member.returns: xCAD application / xCAD 应用对象

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplicationFactory.GetInstalledVersions
member.summary: Returns all installed SOLIDWORKS Document Manager versions 返回本机已安装的 SOLIDWORKS Document Manager 版本。
member.returns: Enumerates versions / 返回版本枚举
member.remarks: Latest supported file version of the application also depends on the version of the Document Manager license key 应用程序可支持的最新文件版本还受 Document Manager 许可证版本限制。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplicationFactory.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an instance of the application from the Document Manager key 根据 Document Manager 许可证密钥创建应用实例。
member.param: Document manager key / Document Manager 许可证密钥
member.returns: xCAD application / xCAD 应用对象

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplicationFactory.FromPointer(SolidWorks.Interop.swdocumentmgr.ISwDMApplication)
member.summary: Creates instance of the application from the COM pointer 使用现成的 COM 指针包装出 xCAD 应用实例。
member.param: Pointer to the application / 应用程序 COM 指针
member.returns: xCAD application / xCAD 应用对象

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplicationFactory.ConnectToDm(System.Security.SecureString)
member.summary: Connects to the native Document Manager COM server using the secure license key. 使用安全字符串形式的许可证密钥连接到底层 Document Manager COM 服务器。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplicationFactory.CreateVersion(Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmVersion_e)
member.summary: Creates a version of the application 根据主版本号创建 xCAD 的版本对象。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.ISwDmObject
member.summary: Base xCAD object backed by a Document Manager dispatch. 基于 Document Manager 调度对象（Dispatch）的 xCAD 基础对象。

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.ISwDmObject.Dispatch
member.summary: Native COM dispatch pointer or raw wrapped object. 原生 COM 调度指针或被包装的底层对象。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmObject
member.summary: Default implementation shared by most Document Manager wrappers. 大多数 Document Manager 包装类型共用的默认实现，负责保存所有权关系与标签容器。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmObject.#ctor(System.Object,Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplication,Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument)
member.summary: Stores the raw COM dispatch and its owning application/document context. 保存原始 COM 调度对象以及其所属的应用程序、文档上下文。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmObject.Equals(Xarial.XCad.IXObject)
member.summary: Two wrappers are considered equal when they point to the same underlying dispatch object. 当两个包装器引用同一个底层调度对象时，将其视为同一 xCAD 对象。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmObjectFactory
member.summary: Converts raw Document Manager dispatch objects into strongly typed xCAD wrappers. 把原始 Document Manager 调度对象转换为强类型的 xCAD 包装器。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.ISwDmSelObject
member.summary: Selectable xCAD object contract for Document Manager wrappers. Document Manager 包装器中的可选择对象约定；虽然接口存在，但大多数选择行为在离线 API 中并不支持。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmSelObject
member.summary: Base class for selectable entities such as components, sheets, and cut-list items. 组件、图纸页、切割清单项等可选择实体的基础类。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmSelObject.#ctor(System.Object,Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmApplication,Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.Documents.SwDmDocument)
member.summary: Initializes a selectable wrapper with its ownership context. 使用所属应用和文档上下文初始化一个可选择对象包装器。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmVersion_e
member.summary: Maps SOLIDWORKS release years to the numeric major version used by Document Manager. 把 SOLIDWORKS 发布年份映射到 Document Manager 使用的数值主版本号。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.ISwDmVersion
member.summary: xCAD version abstraction for SOLIDWORKS Document Manager. 面向 SOLIDWORKS Document Manager 的 xCAD 版本抽象。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmVersion
member.summary: Concrete version object used for comparison and display. 用于版本比较与显示的具体版本对象。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmVersion.#ctor(System.Version)
member.summary: Builds the strongly typed version object from a raw .NET version. 根据原始 .NET `Version` 构建强类型的 SOLIDWORKS 版本对象。

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmVersion.CompareTo(Xarial.XCad.IXVersion)
member.summary: Compares two SOLIDWORKS Document Manager versions. 比较两个 SOLIDWORKS Document Manager 版本的先后关系。

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.SwDocumentManager.SwDmVersionExtension
member.summary: Helper extensions for version capability checks. 用于能力判定的版本扩展方法，例如判断某个 API 是否在指定版本及以上可用。
